description: The ProtoFluxOutputProxy component is used to manage the output sockets of protoflux nodes, making components become the actual visuals the user uses to interact with protoflux with. Otherwise, users would have to use purely the developer tool.

fields.Node: The ProtoFlux component whose output you wish to proxy.
fields.ElementName: The name that appears when you hover this output with a Flux Tool.
fields.IsDynamic: Whether this output can be converted by inputting a different type.
fields.Index: The index in a list if this points to a list of outputs.
fields.ConnectPoint: What Slot a wire visual parents itself under.
fields.Wire: The wire Manager handling the visual for the connection to this connector.
fields.NodeOutput: The field on a protoflux node Component this connector is being used as a way to connect to.
fields.OutputType: The type of the output this proxy is for.
